backend/.devcontainer/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the default Java version argument in the devcontainer Dockerfile from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.

backend/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json.general_idea: Update the devcontainer Java version argument from 17 to 21 to match the target JDK migration.

backend/src/main/docker/postgresql.yml.general_idea: Change the host port mapping for the PostgreSQL service from 5432 to 5434 to avoid port conflicts.

backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.general_idea: Remove unused imports related to Hibernate cache settings, Spring autowiring, and JHipster key generation utilities that are no longer used in the class.
Remove fields for Git and Build properties which were previously used for cache key generation.
backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.before:
private GitProperties gitProperties;
private BuildProperties buildProperties;

backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.general_idea: Remove the HibernatePropertiesCustomizer bean that configured the JCache manager for Hibernate, likely due to a change in how Hibernate integrates with JCache or removal of Hibernate second-level cache configuration in this context.
Update the list of cached entities to reflect the current domain model, replacing User/Authority caches with medical domain entities like Paciente, ExpedienteClinico, etc.
Remove setter methods for Git and Build properties that were used to inject values for the now-removed key generator.
Remove the custom KeyGenerator bean that used Git and Build properties to generate cache keys, as this functionality is no longer required or implemented differently.

backend/src/main/resources/config/applic.general_idea: Update the PostgreSQL database connection port in the development configuration from 5432 to 5434.
